questions.question: What southern city is famous for its "Beale Street Blues"?
What horror writer described his body of work as "the literary equivalent of a Big Mac and fries"?
What did reporters don to view computer images of Mars at the Jet Propulsion Lab on November 4, 1997?
How many men played on the first basketball teams—5, 7 or 9?
What decade-beginning year did radio listeners first hear, "Look! Up in the sky! It's a bird! It's a plane"?
